title: Bug report - 4 gang wall switch stopped working
excerpt:
### Describe the bug

After upgrading to 0.2.75 every 4 gang wall switch from Moes (Tuya OEM) stopped working. The device is listed in homey with no errors, but after the upgrade all flows had lost the specific button defined for the different When cards. Redefining them by selecting for example Button 1 | 1 Click and saving the flow doesn't change anything, the flow still doesn't work afterwards.

### To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Upgrade to 0.2.75
2. All flows using the wall switch stopped working, redefining the specific button doesn't work.

### Expected behavior

Wall switches should've continued working.

### App and Homey version

Homey Pro 2023
Firmware 13.0.0
App 0.2.75

Zigbee interview is below.
